analysisSources: backend-analyst: ADK pipeline, scalability, security, deployment
product-analyst: UX, features, monetization, RICE prioritization
market-analyst: competitive landscape, pricing, market sizing
ux-testing: Playwright MCP E2E testing + Agent Team code review (2026-02-24)

features.name: Event capture
features.description: Capture user interactions: click, input, scroll, navigate, submit, change events from the DOM
acceptanceCriteria: Click events captured with coordinates
Input events debounced and captured with final value
Scroll events throttled and captured with position
Form submit events captured
SPA navigation detected via History API polling
Change events captured for select, date, time, color, range inputs

features.name: Element metadata and smart selectors
features.description: Extract comprehensive element metadata with CSS/XPath selectors and confidence scoring
acceptanceCriteria: Tag, id, classes, text, role, aria-label, name, type, href, placeholder extracted
CSS selector generated with priority cascade: data-testid > id > aria-label > classes > name > nth-of-type
XPath selector generated
Confidence score assigned based on selector stability (0.20-0.95)
BoundingBox captured for element position

features.name: Screenshot capture
features.description: Capture visible tab screenshot after each action with configurable JPEG quality
acceptanceCriteria: Screenshot taken via chrome.tabs.captureVisibleTab
Quality configurable via settings (40-100)
Screenshot stored as data URL in CapturedAction
Graceful failure if screenshot fails

features.name: Tab video recording
features.description: Record tab video via MediaRecorder in offscreen document
acceptanceCriteria: Video capture via chrome.tabCapture.getMediaStreamId
Offscreen document handles MediaRecorder
Video blob saved to IndexedDB on stop
Start/stop lifecycle managed by background service worker

features.name: Template-based description generation
features.description: Generate human-readable descriptions for captured actions using templates
acceptanceCriteria: Each action type has a description template
Templates use element metadata (text, aria-label, placeholder, name, id, tag)
Descriptions are concise and readable

features.name: IndexedDB storage via Dexie
features.description: Persistent storage for sessions, actions, and video blobs using Dexie ORM over IndexedDB
acceptanceCriteria: Sessions table with CRUD operations
Actions table with compound index [sessionId+sequenceNumber]
VideoBlobs table for recorded videos
Ordered action queries by session
Transaction support for cascading deletes

features.name: SidePanel UI
features.description: Chrome side panel showing step list, step detail, notes editing, and export controls
acceptanceCriteria: Step list view with action type icons and descriptions
Step detail view with full metadata and screenshot
Notes editing per step with save
Navigation between list and detail views
Drag reorder of steps

features.name: Popup UI
features.description: Browser action popup with recording controls and status display
acceptanceCriteria: Start/Stop/Pause/Resume buttons based on status
Status indicator with color and label
Action count display during recording
Open side panel button
Keyboard shortcut hints displayed

features.name: Options page
features.description: Extension options page for configuring screenshot quality and throttle/debounce timers
acceptanceCriteria: Screenshot quality slider (40-100%)
Scroll throttle interval setting (500-3000ms)
Input debounce interval setting (200-2000ms)
Settings persisted to chrome.storage.local
Clear All Data button

features.name: JSON export
features.description: Export recording session to ProcessExport JSON schema v1.0.0
acceptanceCriteria: Exports to ProcessExport format with metadata and steps
Triggers file download with .json extension
Includes all action data, selectors, screenshots, and decision points

features.name: HTML export
features.description: Export recording session to styled, self-contained HTML document
acceptanceCriteria: Self-contained HTML with inline CSS
Step cards with screenshots and decision badges
Readable format for documentation sharing

features.name: Keyboard shortcuts
features.description: Global keyboard shortcuts for recording control
acceptanceCriteria: Ctrl+Shift+R starts recording
Ctrl+Shift+P pauses/resumes recording
Ctrl+Shift+S stops recording
Shortcuts defined in wxt.config.ts manifest

features.name: Wire user settings to capture pipeline
Zustand store as single source of truth
Markdown and clipboard export
features.description: Export recording as Markdown text or copy to clipboard for quick sharing in Notion, Confluence, Slack, GitHub issues
acceptanceCriteria: Export to Markdown (.md) with step headers, descriptions, and inline screenshot links
Copy to clipboard button that copies Markdown-formatted text
Screenshots referenced as data URLs or excluded via option
Clipboard notification toast on success

features.name: Chrome Web Store submission
features.description: Prepare and submit extension to Chrome Web Store for public distribution
acceptanceCriteria: Privacy policy page (hosted URL)
Store listing: description, screenshots (5+), promo images
Icons: 128x128 store icon, 48x48 toolbar icon
Permissions justification for activeTab, tabs, storage, sidePanel, offscreen
Content Security Policy compliant
Passes Chrome Web Store review

features.name: Step search and filter
features.description: Add text search and action type filter within a recording session
acceptanceCriteria: Search input at top of step list
Filters steps by description text match
Action type filter dropdown (click, input, scroll, navigate, submit)
Clear filter button
Result count displayed

features.name: Screenshot thumbnails in step list
features.description: Show small screenshot preview in the step list view for quick visual scanning
acceptanceCriteria: Thumbnail (48x36px) shown to the right of each step in StepList
Lazy-loaded to avoid memory issues with 100+ steps
Click thumbnail opens step detail
Toggle thumbnails on/off via setting

features.name: First-run onboarding experience
features.description: Guide new users through their first recording with tooltips and contextual help
acceptanceCriteria: Welcome tooltip on first install pointing to Start Recording
Info icons (i) next to Options settings with explanatory tooltips
After first recording: overlay explaining the 3 export formats
Hide backend URL in collapsible Advanced section
Onboarding state tracked in chrome.storage.local

features.name: Hover and right-click event capture
features.description: Capture hover (mouseover on interactive elements) and right-click (contextmenu) events for complete workflow documentation
acceptanceCriteria: Hover events captured on elements with title, tooltip, or dropdown triggers
Right-click/contextmenu events captured with target element
New action type icons for hover and contextmenu
Configurable: can disable hover capture to reduce noise
Playwright exporter generates page.hover() for hover actions

features.name: GitHub Issue export
features.description: Export recording as a GitHub issue with steps to reproduce, screenshots, and metadata
acceptanceCriteria: Create GitHub Issue button in export panel
GitHub personal access token stored in chrome.storage.local
Issue body: numbered steps with descriptions and inline screenshots
Repository selector (owner/repo)
Labels and assignee optional fields
Success notification with link to created issue

features.name: Export preview panel
features.description: Show a preview of the export output before downloading
acceptanceCriteria: Preview modal/panel showing rendered HTML snippet
Toggle between JSON, HTML, Playwright preview
Copy to clipboard from preview
Download button within preview

features.name: Undo toast for destructive actions
features.description: Replace confirm() dialogs with undo toast notifications for delete operations
acceptanceCriteria: Delete step shows undo toast instead of confirm dialog
Delete session shows undo toast with 5-second countdown
Undo restores deleted item from a temporary buffer
Toast auto-dismisses and commits delete after countdown

features.name: Fix backend Dockerfile and deployment
features.description: Fix critical deployment issues: Dockerfile CMD, health check, startup validation, workers
acceptanceCriteria: Dockerfile CMD uses correct ADK startup command (not uvicorn app:app)
Health check endpoint returns 200 on /health
Startup validates GOOGLE_CLOUD_PROJECT, GOOGLE_CLOUD_LOCATION env vars
uvicorn runs with --workers 4
Non-root user in container
.dockerignore excludes .env, __pycache__, *.pyc

features.name: Fix screenshot data format for vision models
features.description: Send screenshot as inlineData image parts instead of base64 text string in ADK API calls
acceptanceCriteria: backend-client.ts sends screenshot as inlineData with mimeType and base64 data
screenshot_analyzer receives actual image for visual analysis
Fallback to text-only if screenshot unavailable
Tests verify correct message format

features.name: Fix ADK session state race condition
features.description: Poll session state with backoff after /run instead of immediate GET to avoid reading stale data
acceptanceCriteria: After POST /run returns 200, poll GET session state with exponential backoff
Max 5 retries with 500ms, 1s, 2s, 4s, 8s delays
Check output_keys exist before returning response
Timeout after 15s returns null gracefully

features.name: Backend API authentication
features.description: Add authentication to ADK backend endpoints to prevent unauthorized access
acceptanceCriteria: API key header validation (X-API-Key) on all endpoints
API key configurable in Options page alongside backend URL
backend-client.ts sends API key header with every request
401 response on missing/invalid key
Environment variable for API key on server side

features.name: Backend retry with exponential backoff
features.description: Add retry logic to backend-client.ts for transient failures (429, 503, network errors)
acceptanceCriteria: Retry on 429 (rate limit) and 503 (service unavailable) with exponential backoff
Max 3 retries per request
Respect Retry-After header if present
No retry on 400/401/404 (client errors)
UI indicator when enrichment is retrying

features.name: Pin model versions and consolidate ADK apps
features.description: Replace preview model IDs with versioned GA IDs and consolidate 3 ADK apps into 1
acceptanceCriteria: Model IDs use versioned format (gemini-3-flash-001 instead of gemini-3-flash-preview)
Model names configurable via environment variables
Single ADK app exposes all agents via appName routing
Single Dockerfile and Cloud Run service
Remove validator_app.py and analyzer_app.py entry points

features.name: Cloud sync and sharing
features.description: Sync recordings to cloud storage and generate shareable links for team collaboration
acceptanceCriteria: Cloud storage backend for recordings (Supabase or Firebase)
User authentication (Google Sign-In or email/password)
Upload recording to cloud on demand (not auto-sync)
Generate shareable read-only link for a recording
View shared recording in browser without extension installed
Delete cloud recording
Sync indicator in session list (local-only vs cloud)

features.name: PDF export
features.description: Export recording as a downloadable PDF document for non-technical stakeholders
acceptanceCriteria: PDF generated from HTML export template
Page breaks between steps or every 3-4 steps
Cover page with session name, date, step count
Print-optimized layout (no video, no interactive elements)
File size reasonable (<10MB for 20-step recording)

features.name: Hosted AI enrichment endpoint
features.description: Managed Vertex AI backend so users don't need to deploy their own ADK instance
acceptanceCriteria: Hosted endpoint on Cloud Run with API key auth
Rate limiting per API key (100 actions/day free, paid plans for more)
Usage dashboard showing API calls and costs
Extension defaults to hosted endpoint (no setup needed)
Opt-out to self-hosted via Advanced settings

features.name: Team workspace with shared recordings
features.description: Team-based workspace where members can share, annotate, and manage recordings collaboratively
acceptanceCriteria: Create team workspace with invite link
Team members see shared session library
Role-based access: admin, editor, viewer
Annotations and comments on individual steps
Activity feed showing team recording activity

features.name: CI/CD integration (GitHub Actions)
features.description: GitHub Actions plugin that runs exported Playwright tests automatically on PR/push
acceptanceCriteria: Export Playwright test directly to a GitHub repository
GitHub Actions workflow template included in export
Test results reported back to the extension or as PR comment
Configuration for base URL, browser, and test timeout

features.name: Custom branding for HTML/PDF exports
features.description: Allow users to customize HTML and PDF exports with company logo, colors, and header/footer
acceptanceCriteria: Logo upload in Options page (stored in chrome.storage.local)
Primary color picker for export accent color
Custom header text and footer text
Logo and branding applied to HTML and PDF exports
Table of contents for recordings with 10+ steps

features.name: Jira and Linear integration
features.description: Create tickets in Jira or Linear directly from a recording with steps to reproduce
acceptanceCriteria: Jira Cloud integration via OAuth or API token
Linear integration via API key
Create issue with numbered steps, screenshots, and metadata
Project/board selector
Link to recording attached to ticket

features.name: Edge inference with Chrome Built-in AI
features.description: Use Chrome Prompt API (Gemini Nano) for description generation and decision detection locally, reducing backend dependency and cost
acceptanceCriteria: Detect Chrome AI availability via window.ai.languageModel
Use Gemini Nano for description_generator (text-only, no vision needed)
Use Gemini Nano for decision_detector (text-only reasoning)
Keep screenshot_analyzer on Vertex AI (vision model required)
Graceful fallback to backend if Chrome AI unavailable
~60% cost reduction per recording

features.name: Playwright test.step() blocks and parameterization
features.description: Improve Playwright export with test.step() blocks, data-driven testing, and waitForNavigation
acceptanceCriteria: Group related actions into test.step() blocks
Parameterize input values via test fixtures
Password fields use environment variables instead of masked placeholders
Add page.waitForNavigation() around click actions that trigger page changes
Add page.waitForSelector() for dynamic content
Optional: generate Page Object Model (POM) structure

features.name: Cypress test exporter
features.description: Export recording as Cypress test script for teams using Cypress instead of Playwright
acceptanceCriteria: Generates valid .cy.ts Cypress test file
Locator cascade adapted for Cypress: cy.get('[data-testid]') > cy.contains() > cy.get(css)
cy.visit() for navigation, cy.type() for input, cy.click() for clicks
cy.intercept() for API-dependent actions

features.name: Selenium WebDriver test exporter
features.description: Export recording as Selenium WebDriver test script for teams using Selenium (most popular test automation framework globally)
acceptanceCriteria: Generates valid Selenium WebDriver .js test file with Mocha structure
Locator cascade: By.css('[data-testid]') > By.id() > By.linkText() > By.name() > By.css()
driver.get() for navigation, sendKeys() for input, click() for clicks
driver.actions() for hover/contextmenu, executeScript for scroll
process.env.PASSWORD for password fields
driver.wait(until.elementLocated) for element waits
driver.wait(until.urlContains) for navigation waits

features.name: Puppeteer test exporter
features.description: Export recording as Puppeteer test script, completing the big 4 browser automation frameworks (Playwright, Cypress, Selenium, Puppeteer)
acceptanceCriteria: Generates valid Puppeteer .js test file with Mocha structure
Selector cascade: [data-testid] > #id > [aria-label] > CSS
page.goto() for navigation, type() for input, click() for clicks
page.evaluate() for scroll, hover/contextmenu via element methods
Promise.all for click + waitForNavigation to avoid race conditions
process.env.PASSWORD for password fields

features.name: Fix empty URL in navigate steps
features.description: Navigate actions (tab switch, initial navigation) store empty string for URL. Root cause: background.ts handleTabSwitch uses `tab.url || ''` and event-capture.ts navigate action omits URL. Affects Cypress export (crash), Playwright export (page.goto('')), step descriptions ('Navigated to '), and step detail display.
acceptanceCriteria: handleTabSwitch in background.ts captures actual tab URL (never empty string)
event-capture.ts navigate action includes current window.location.href
Description generator shows full URL: 'Navigated to https://example.com'
Step detail shows actual URL instead of empty field
All exporters receive valid URLs for navigate steps

features.name: Fix Cypress exporter crash on empty URLs
features.description: Cypress exporter crashes with TypeError: Failed to construct 'URL': Invalid URL when step has empty URL. Root cause: `new URL(nextAction.url).pathname` at lines 58 and 85 without try-catch. Selenium exporter has same pattern but with try-catch (safe).
acceptanceCriteria: Wrap new URL() calls in cypress-exporter.ts with try-catch
Fallback to '/' pathname when URL is empty or invalid
Add test for empty URL edge case
Verify all other exporters handle empty URLs gracefully

features.name: Recording indicator on web page
features.description: No visual feedback on the actual web page being recorded. User must reopen popup to confirm recording is active. Content script should inject a non-intrusive floating indicator (e.g., small red dot or badge) that shows recording state.
acceptanceCriteria: Floating recording indicator injected via content script when recording starts
Shows red dot/badge with 'Recording' label
Positioned in corner, non-intrusive (does not interfere with page content)
Shows step count incrementing in real time
Indicator removed when recording stops or pauses
Can be dismissed/minimized by user
Does not appear in captured screenshots

features.name: Collapsible export panel with categories
features.description: Export section shows 11 buttons at once, taking half the side panel space. Overwhelming for first-time users. Group exports into collapsible categories: Documentation (JSON, HTML, Markdown, PDF), Test Automation (Playwright, Playwright+CI, Cypress, Selenium, Puppeteer), Integrations (GitHub Issues, Copy, Preview).
acceptanceCriteria: Export buttons grouped into 3 collapsible sections
Sections: Documentation, Test Automation, Integrations
Only one section expanded at a time (accordion behavior)
Remember last expanded section in session
Quick actions (Copy, Preview) always visible outside accordion
Section headers show count of export options

features.name: Discoverable session rename
features.description: Session rename exists via double-click on session name, but this is not discoverable. No visual hint or edit icon. Users assume sessions cannot be renamed.
acceptanceCriteria: Edit icon (pencil) visible on session name hover
Click edit icon enters rename mode (same as current double-click)
Tooltip on hover: 'Double-click to rename'
Keep double-click as alternative interaction

features.name: Popup UX improvements
features.description: Multiple UX issues in popup: too much empty space, 'Open Review Panel' terminology unclear for first-time users, no indication which tab will be recorded, no brief explanation of what the tool does.
acceptanceCriteria: Compact layout with less vertical padding
Rename 'Open Review Panel' to 'Review Recording' or 'Open Side Panel'
Show current tab title/URL that will be recorded
Add one-line description: 'Record and document web processes'
Popup auto-closes after starting recording (configurable in Options)

features.name: Step detail UX for non-technical users
features.description: Step detail shows raw CSS selectors and XPath which are meaningless to non-technical users. 'Decision Point' toggle has no explanation. Technical metadata should be hidden by default with expandable 'Technical Details' section.
acceptanceCriteria: CSS/XPath selectors hidden by default in collapsible 'Technical Details' section
Decision Point toggle has tooltip explaining what it means
Confidence score shown as visual indicator (color bar) not raw number
Element info shows human-readable summary: 'Link: Form Authentication'

features.name: Session list improvements
features.description: Multiple session list UX issues: sessions with identical auto-generated names are indistinguishable, latest recording doesn't appear immediately, no visual indicator for active/selected session.
acceptanceCriteria: Auto-generated session names include tab title or first action URL
Active/selected session has visual highlight (border/background)
Session list auto-refreshes when recording stops
Each session shows date, step count, and duration as secondary info
Most recent session appears at top of list

features.name: Navigate step quality improvements
features.description: Navigate steps show 'Navigated to ' with empty URL, have grey/empty thumbnails, and generate useless export code. Improve description, provide fallback thumbnail, and ensure useful data in exports.
acceptanceCriteria: Navigate step description includes page title and URL
Fallback thumbnail shows page favicon or generic navigation icon when screenshot missing
Playwright export skips navigate steps with empty URL instead of generating page.goto('')
All exporters handle navigate steps gracefully with actual URL data

features.name: Session naming on recording start
features.description: Users cannot name a recording before or during the session. All sessions get auto-generated names, making it hard to identify specific recordings later.
acceptanceCriteria: Optional name field in popup before clicking Start Recording
Default name auto-generated if left empty (current behavior)
Session name editable during recording via side panel header
Name persisted to IndexedDB immediately
